title: vitex heterophylla var. puberula
intro: Vitex heterophylla var. puberula, also known as Chaste Tree, is a plant species native to the Americas and belongs to the Verbena family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat menstrual disorders, anxiety, and insomnia, due to the presence of flavonoids and iridoids. The health benefits of Vitex heterophylla var. puberula include its potential to regulate menstrual cycles, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve sleep quality. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are often used to support reproductive health and alleviate menopausal symptoms.
